calendar.matters:
MOTION /Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Release Property From Mechanics' Lien
Off Calendar Mar-22-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE:
Richard M. Kaplan, Esq. 922-4640 for Petitioner moving to release property from mechanic's lien and requesting attorneys' fees
Plaintiff HERSH' petition to release property from mechanics' lien is granted -- no opposition filed. Court will look at the order on the attorney fees issue.
(JJM) Susan Crozier, CSR 4761

MOTION /Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Release Property From Mechanics' Lien
Off Calendar Feb-19-2002 Continued To Mar-22-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Richard M. Kaplan, Esq. 922-4640 petitioning to releasse property from mechanics' lien

Tentative ruling adopted -- Plaintiff's Motion on Petition to release property from mechanics' lien: Previous tentative ruling of "Granted - no opposition filed" is vacated. The Court will issue an order continuing this matter. Order signed in open court continuing this motion to M A R C H 2 2, 2 0 0 2 for hearing.
(JJM/KH) Eric Throne, CSR 7855
